## PiWs.configure() method

Merges additional server configuration into the current instance.

**Signature:**

```typescript
configure(config: PiWsOptions): this;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter

</th><th>

Type

</th><th>

Description

</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

config

</td><td>

[PiWsOptions](./pi-ws.piwsoptions.md)

</td><td>

Partial configuration to merge.

</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

this

The current `PiWs` instance.

## Remarks

This is the main library-first configuration entrypoint when you want to build a server incrementally instead of passing all options to the constructor.
